top_level_fields.insured_address: 2200 Port Avenue, Building D, Elizabeth, NJ 07206

description_of_operations: Newly acquired subsidiary. 30-day binder pending full policy issuance. Operations: third-party logistics, last-mile delivery, and small-package warehousing.
conditions: This binder is not a policy of insurance. It confirms that temporary coverage is in effect between the dates shown above, subject to the terms, conditions, and exclusions of the anticipated policy.

The full policy is expected to issue on or before the binder expiration date. If the full policy is not issued by 2025-04-11, coverage under this binder terminates automatically at 12:01 AM on that date.
Premium: interim premium of $4,125 due on bind. Final premium will be computed at policy issuance based on audited exposures.
